typed: Solid architecture and clear technology choices
hero.description:
I tackle complex challenges, helping to design, evolve, and implement digital platforms and products with technical expertise and a long-term vision.
I cover the entire cycle: analysis, architecture, technology selection, and implementation, ensuring scalable, sustainable, and well-crafted solutions.

approachSection.title: How I work
approachSection.subtitle: Clear process, frequent delivery, outcome focus.

steps.title: Discover
steps.desc: Understand problem, users and goals. Define scope and success.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Short iterations with feedback. Clean code, tests and performance.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.desc: Deploy and measure. Documentation and smooth handoff.

skills.title: Technologies & Tools
skills.subtitle: These are the main technologies and tools I use in my projects.
